name: Wintrust Financial Corporation
description: Wintrust Financial Corporation is a financial services holding company based in Rosemont, Illinois, that operates a family of locally run community banks. The company provides a comprehensive range of banking, mortgage, wealth management, and commercial finance services to individuals and businesses. With a strong focus on community-oriented banking, Wintrust maintains an extensive network of locations across the greater Chicago area, southern Wisconsin, west Michigan, northwest Indiana, and southwest Florida, dedicated to delivering personalized financial solutions and supporting the economic growth of the communities it serves.
